headline: Steel Dynamics Has a Dissapointing Update Ahead of Earnings
summary: The company expects per-share earnings of $2.73 to $2.77 for the quarter, below analysts’ consensus estimates of $3.24.

headline: Nucor Corp. (NYSE:NUE): A High-Quality Dividend Stock for Sustainable Passive Income
summary: Nucor Corp. (NUE) offers a reliable dividend with a strong history of growth, backed by solid profitability and a healthy balance sheet for sustainable passive income.
